description: Example Keycloak realm claim-to-caller_identities field mapping for seccomp-privacy-platform
notes: realm_access.roles uses dotted-path resolution to extract Keycloak realm roles
azp is the Keycloak client_id of the service account making the request
tenant_id is a custom claim injected by the Keycloak token mapper
subject_type _const:service_account means every token from this issuer is treated as a service_account
Override individual fields in issuer_registry.claim_mapping_json for per-issuer customisation
